case_title: GIMBAL CAPITAL INC. VS. CELERINA P ACEBO ET AL

docket_entries.description: FEE PAID FOR [PROPOSED] ORDER GRANTING THE DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF EXECUTION (TRANSACTION ID # 100025779) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GIMBAL CAPITAL INC.

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ACEBO, CELERINA P

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIMBAL CAPITAL INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACEBO, CELERINA P $2,593.43 PRINCIPAL, $560.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $169.11 INTEREST, $492.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,815.04, NO EXECTION SHALL BE ISSUED AS LONG AS DEFENDANT MAKES PAYMENTS PURSUANT TO TEH FOLLOWING PAYMENT PLAN; CONSECUTIVE MONTHLY PAYMENT OF $150 BEGINING JUNE 10, 16 AND DUE ON THE SAME DAY EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL THE ENTIRE JUDGMENT BALANCE INCLUDING ACCRUED INTEREST IS PAID IN FULL. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $150.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $169.41 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 100026578) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GIMBAL CAPITAL INC.
FEE PAID ON: [PROPOSED] ORDER GRANTING THE DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF EXECUTION (TRANSACTION ID # 100026641) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GIMBAL CAPITAL INC.
